DashboardOne daily view for the whole business.Studio ReviewUpload, comment, approve and version creative work.Workspace StorageLibraries, permissions, versions and linked files.CRM, Reports & FinanceClients, reports, invoices and business admin.
Solutions⌄

One operating system for modern teams

Run your business. All in one place.

Projects, people, storage, clients, communication, studio review, reports, invoices and AI — CSorro brings the tools a business needs into one clean operating system.

Everything connected. Nothing scattered.

CSorro is modular: enable the parts your workspace needs, then manage the whole business from one clean dashboard.

▣

Dashboard

Your morning briefing for projects, clients, reviews, storage and finance.

Explore →
☑

Projects

Tasks, files, chat, whiteboards and approvals in one project home.

Explore →
▢

Studio Review

Upload clips, leave timestamp comments, manage versions and approve work.

Explore →
▥

Storage

Workspace-owned storage with libraries, permissions, comments and versions.

Explore →
◈

CRM + Clients

Keep clients, contacts, projects, files, messages and invoices together.

Explore →
▨

Reports + Finance

Track delivery, create reports, manage invoices and understand performance.

Explore →

Built by someone who has lived the problem

Not another generic project app.

CSorro is being built from real production and operations experience — managing creators, teams, files, reviews, deadlines and business admin across too many disconnected tools.
